emails.subject: Re: Indian Springs
emails.body: Re: Indian Springs This deal is to book the Teco PVR revenue. It is my understanding that Teco just sends us a check, I haven't received an answer as to whether there is a predermined price associated with this deal or if Teco just lets us know what we are giving. I can continue to chase this deal down if you need.
